docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A. , SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN, MICHAEL $6,234.10 PRINCIPAL, $297.61 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,531.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79114858)
